allow: PowerShell(try { laravel --version } catch { "not on PATH" }; "---"; $bin = Join-Path $env:APPDATA "Composer\\vendor\\bin\\laravel.bat"; "Exists: " + \(Test-Path $bin\))
PowerShell(Copy-Item "README.md" "$env:TEMP\\mayang-prd-backup.md" -Force; "Backed up README.md \($\(\(\(Get-Item README.md\).Length\)\) bytes\) to $env:TEMP\\mayang-prd-backup.md")
PowerShell(Move-Item "README.md" "$env:TEMP\\mayang-readme-moved.md" -Force; "Dir contents now:"; Get-ChildItem -Force | Select-Object -ExpandProperty Name)

PowerShell("composer source:"; \(Get-Command composer -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; \(Get-Command composer -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Path; "--- php source:"; \(Get-Command php\).Source; "--- _laravel_tmp exists:"; Test-Path "_laravel_tmp")
PowerShell("PATH has ComposerSetup: " + \($env:PATH -split ';' -contains 'C:\\ProgramData\\ComposerSetup\\bin'\); "--- raw cmd test:"; cmd /c "composer -V")
